title: Loop → RSI → ASI Governance Console
thesis: A loop can restart; RSI can govern improvement; ASI-grade systems require proof before power, replay before trust, and human authority before escalation.
horizonBoundary: ASI is a governance horizon in this public demonstration, not an achievement claim.
claimBoundary: No achieved AGI, ASI, superintelligence, empirical SOTA, external audit completion, production certification, autonomous sovereignty, live RSI authority, live invention authority, or civilization-scale capability claim. ASI is a governance horizon, not an achievement claim.
